prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-WBPASTSS-BUN-37PC-ONE Product Type: SOLDERING_IRON Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 37pc Complete Wood Burning Pen & Assorted Soldering Tips Stencil Hobby Craft Set Description: Unlock your creativity with the 37pc Wood Burning Pen Tool Kit Combo Set, a versatile pyrography and soldering solution designed for woodworkers, DIY hobbyists, crafters, and makers of all skill levels. Whether you're adding custom lettering to woodworking projects, creating detailed pyrography art, embossing leather, or performing light soldering tasks, this complete kit gives you the precision and control you need.

The included wood burning pen features interchangeable tips that allow you to shade, carve, emboss, engrave, and personalize wood surfaces with ease. With a wide variety of wood burning tips, soldering tips, stencils, and a hot knife chuck with blade, this all-in-one set is ideal for customizing signs, décor, crafts, furniture accents, leatherwork, and more. Number, letter, and symbol stencils help beginners achieve professional-looking designs, while experienced creators will appreciate the flexibility for detailed freehand work.

Perfect for woodworking, crafting, home improvement, DIY art projects, and hobby applications, the 37pc Wood Burning Pen & Soldering Tips Set combines convenience, functionality, and creative freedom in one compact kit. Whether you're upgrading your workshop tools or starting a new creative hobby, this multi-purpose wood burning tool set helps bring your ideas to life with precision and style. Search Terms: wood burning kit pyrography tool set wood burner pen tips soldering iron kit wood engraving tool leather embossing burner diy craft burning tool wood burning letters stencil set hobby wood burner beginner pyrography kit crafting heat pen woodworking engraving burner hot knife tool wood art burning kit wood carving burner multi tip soldering wood burning supplies diy wood decor tool Features: - COMPLETE 37PC WOOD BURNING & SOLDERING KIT: Includes wood burning pen, carving and embossing tips, soldering tips, hot knife chuck with blade, plus number, letter and symbol stencils for endless creative possibilities - VERSATILE PYROGRAPHY TOOL FOR MULTIPLE PROJECTS: Ideal for wood burning, engraving, leather embossing, crafting, DIY decor, woodworking personalization, hobby art, and light soldering applications - PRECISION INTERCHANGEABLE TIPS:Easily swap tips to create detailed lines, shading effects, lettering, borders, and decorative textures on wood, cork, leather, and other craft materials - GREAT FOR BEGINNERS & EXPERIENCED MAKERS: Stencils help new users achieve clean, professional designs while advanced users enjoy full creative control for custom woodworking and pyrography art - PERFECT ADDITION TO ANY WORKSHOP OR CRAFT KIT: A must-have wood burning pen set for hobbyists, artists, woodworkers, and DIY enthusiasts looking to personalize projects with a professional touch === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 37pc Wood Burning Pen and Soldering Kit
